DocumentationSubject.Summary: A small opt-in instance documentation slice from the authored docs workspace.
Use the CLI reference to find sanctioned command syntax, options, examples, and operational guidance.
Generated facts are refreshed; authored prose is preserved; rendered HTML is disposable.
Import source facts, add authored narrative, merge a suite, validate it, then render HTML.
Model-first documentation for meta and meta-bi.
Model reference pages describe entities, properties, and relationships generated from workspace models.

DocumentationSubject.DisplayPath: Authored docs page instances.DocumentationSubject.What is Meta?
DocumentationSubject.Summary: Meta is the foundation for modeled workspaces, models, entities, properties, relationships, and instances.

DocumentationSubject.DisplayPath: Authored docs page instances.DocumentationSubject.What is Meta-BI?
DocumentationSubject.Summary: Meta-BI applies Meta concepts to BI schema, SQL, transform, binding, and data-quality tooling.

DocumentationSubject.DisplayPath: Authored docs page instances.DocumentationSubject.Generic workspace and model docs
DocumentationSubject.Summary: Generic workspace imports document model structure without product-specific render logic.
